channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: Why's he a trillionaire when his companies barely make money? — 97 replies — 388.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Why's he a trillionaire when his companies barely make money?

Open thread • Replies: 97 • Updated: 2026-06-14 22:07 UTC

OP

>Tesla makes $3.9B/year, and the amount goes down year after year, yet has a 1.5T market cap
>SpaceX literally loses money and its claim to future profit is Grok, a cash-burning AI model that is losing to GPT and Claude
>Twitter is breakeven at best
What's going on here? Are white boomers just throwing money at him because they don't like seeing Indians, Chinese and Jews running shit in tech? This is the only explanation for the Elon Musk phenomenon I can make any sense of.

Early replies (first 3)

62361459
>>62361452
People rightly see him as a visionary for the future of humanity with the ability to actually do the stuf he foresees.

on the negative side much of what he envisions is distopian

and the first person to pioneer a technology is often NOT the person who gets rich off it

but you have to start somewhere, and he certainly does stuff other companies can't.

62361461
companies do not have to be profitable for people to speculate on them performing well in the future, and it helps when everyone said every company would go to zero but instead became some of the most valuable assets by marketcap in the world because they provided goods and services people wanted

62361471
>>62361459
>rightly
He hasn't even done anything, period.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62364215
>>62362689
After Elon replied "you have said the whole truth" to a post on twatter that was basically "jews are racist towards white people" it was like a switch was flipped. They drug him to israel to make him look at a babby crib from the mossad oct 7 false flag attack and see their gay wall. The US media jews went full Elon bad and the jews sent their deranged libtards golems after Teslas in the streets. It was a sight be behold. The Elon plate carrier is up there with the Jeb Bush hoodie moment.

62364243
>>62361452
Because him are genius businessman.

62364247
>>62361452
Idk but what he did with twitter is up there with the all time great American shit.

62364330
>>62361452
Hypeman incarnated.

62364434
>>62364215
Sometimes I forget how retarded people on this board can be. Thanks for the reminder

62364440
>>62364434
It's genuinely fucked how antisemitic this board can be. Why Mossad hasn't gotten it shut down and its posters dragged through legal coals is fucking mystifying to me.

62364443
>>62364188
Yeah people don't seem to get that the whole point of the company is to offer a form of immortality down the road, by creating neural-digital interfacing that can bridge consciousness between brain and computer. Neuralink can and will charge any amount they want for that kind of tech, once it matures. They could price it at ten billion 2026 dollars per person and they would have a years or even decades-long waitlist.

62364868
>>62364443
yeah anon when moon

62364886
>>62361471
keep seething commie

62364900
>>62363679
Most people talking about him are dogshit retarded

62364907
SpaceX is being destroyed because Elon has to pay off billions of debt for his AI shit and Twitter purchase. The easiest way to do this without destroying Tesla was to merge them all together and IPO them. They're going to sell their stock after Blackrock and Vanguard dump the boomer 401k money buying them

62364918
>>62361478
He threw a pretty good fastball that one time. It made more progress than the vehicle did thoughbeit.

62365050
>>62361452
because stocks don't behave rationally and memes move the market more strongly than financial schizobabble

62365078
>>62361452
you can become one too, just create a crypto coin, mint 1T tokens and sell 1 for $1 on the open markets

62365099
>>62361452
heres the thing. it was all vaporware the whole time...tesla included. it just wasnt as brazen as the ipo before...worse with every scam. so he could keep borrowing. because hes doing "buy borrow die", it became the banks problem at this point because hes never gonna pay them back, he couldnt if he wanted to, he couldnt if they tried to liquidate. they are heavily incentivized to help him dump the baggies on you to close out these transactions. then he can have a fake ketamine overdose and go party with jeffjeff again.

62365104
>>62361452
elon is one of the only men actually creating value in this world.

almost the entire economy is pure pointless bullshit
>delivering sneakers to bestial niggers
>selling sloppa to bestial niggers
>keeping morbidly obese 100 year old bestial niggers alive
>manufacturing weapons so bestial niggers can shoot each other and blow shit up
>making handbags for the bestial femboons

elon is pursuing the future, the transcendence. he deserves to win.

62365105
>>62365104
They are going to deepfake it all just like nasa with kubrik except this time you paid for it by buying the ipo instead of pillaged wwii wealth

62365111
>>62365105
you are simply a low iq schizoid. you're exactly like the npcs except you're against the current thing.

62365115
>>62365111
You got mkultrad because your uncle molested you while you watched star trek or some other faggot shit and you liked it. Now spaecekeks launches make you feel cummies

62365124
>>62365115
very complex projection. must be something personal.

62365130
>>62365124
Keep fantacizing about scifi bullshit that will never happen. I hope you buy a neuralink and end up like terry schiavo

62365216
>>62365130
low iq npcs such as yourself cannot conceive of something which is not the current thing. you have my pity.

62365235
>>62361452
vibe investing.

62365240
>>62361452
it's because Musk is a cult leader

62365247
>>62361459
Literally what is "dystopian" about swarms of AI powered assassin drones?

62366996
>>62361471
I wish I could make a trillion doing nothing

62367047
Space X is worth 2 trillion...because it just is ok!

62367049
>>62363603
Tesla cars tend to burst in flames more than the most insignificant chink car company.

62367163
>>62361452
Elon Cuck

62367477
>>62361549
lol, >>62361539 can't handle the truth

item.title: >DUDE JUST BUY A HOUSE LMAO what if your corrupt local government approves several AI data centers and they get built 10… — 55 replies — 220.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
>DUDE JUST BUY A HOUSE LMAO what if your corrupt local government approves several AI data centers and they get built 10…

Open thread • Replies: 55 • Updated: 2026-06-14 22:07 UTC

OP

>DUDE JUST BUY A HOUSE LMAO
what if your corrupt local government approves several AI data centers and they get built 100 feet away from your house? why would i want to risk this?
>THAT WILL NEVER HAPPEN
it's happening all over the US.

Early replies (first 3)

62358792
>don't buy a house!!
>what if someone builds a wearhouse and puts gpus inside of it!!!
really retard?

62358798
>>62358792
the "what if" could be extended to any number of scenarios.
>halfway house gets built next door
>neighbor turns his SFH into a section ape rental

62358803
>>62358792
>>62358798
also the word is "warehouse" you 60 IQ simian niggerbeast.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62361000
>>62360795
Uh buddy I don't know how to tell you this but water comes from the wall. Or a hose if your wall has a hose.

62361003
>>62360795
>Where's all the water going to come from?

how much water do server and electronics need

62361006
>>62358781
IPO was a success. nothing you can do but seethe, lol.

62361042
>>62358781
surprised they wouldn't use the loopholes to take your house too. you don't really own anything if you aren't close to the people in power

62361046
>>62359755
Datacenters create incredibly few jobs actually. They increase work during construction, then hire an H1B skeleton crew.

62362112
>>62360795
They need to ban evaporation cooling for data centers. Let them do the extra steps to either radiate the heat into the air or run their hot water back into the grid.
>>62361003
Most of these data centers use evaporation towers to get rid of the massive amounts of heat those GPUs generate. This is the cheapest way to cool those data centers, especially when corrupt local government provides you with cheap fresh water.

62362134
Why doesn’t the orange retard just take Greenland and put the data centers in the ice

62362146
>>62358781
>tfw used to live in NoVa 7 years ago
I used to live 5 miles away from a chilled beverage distribution center and the monotonous everpresent EEEEEEEEEEEEEEEENNNNHHHH their chillers made pissed me off to no end for 3 years straight, day and night, no holidays off. If I had to deal with 10 of those at once within the vicinity of my home things would get very very violent very very quickly.

62362171
>>62358781
How long until data center construction constitutes eminent domain?

62362554
>>62358781
I’m surprised the west coast has such a small amount of centers. Hippies aren’t so bad after all
Texas looks fucked. Thank god they don’t have all those rules and regulations of California
Kek

62362585
Idaho it is

62362850
>>62362112
data centers use globally in one year the same amount of water the US uses for agriculture in a single day
>they need to ablooablooo
they need to stop listening to retards
>>62362554
california is one the most water strained states in the US and they waste it on planting almonds for said hippies.

62364056
>>62362171
>he doesn't know
https://www.11alive.com/article/news/local/coweta-homeowner-claims-georgia-power-is-undervaluing-home-in-an-eminent-domain-dispute/85-b6e3d335-3f99-4e12-badf-e46961de31b9
https://ohiocapitaljournal.com/2026/06/10/ohio-farmers-fear-new-proposal-would-allow-data-centers-to-take-property/

62364063
Homeowners do everything they possibly can to fuck over people that struggle with housing

So good. I hope the datacentres take their jobs as well. Build more datacentres, a thousand times more of them.

62364064
>>62358803
What about a warhouse? That would be even worse.

62364066
>>62364064
>500,000 square foot whorehouse being built next door

62364067
>>62358781
i know an old guy who owns this house right outside shithole apartments. they were nice apartments once, and the neighborhood was good. he put metal shutters on his doors and windows. his house is like a fortress.
you adapt, or you sell. still better than renting.

62364096
>>62364066
Imagine living by a horrorhouse around Halloween. Very hectic.

62364252
>>62358781
oh no the warehouse full of gpus!

62364256
>>62358781
Based florida (shithole of Miami doesnt count)

62364346
>>62358781
Just live in a good area lmao stop being so poor

I live on a lake in a gated community we aren’t gonna get any data centers here, I hope the state allows more to be built around me, it’s good for my business

62364393
>>62358781
that they're paying a premium to rezone and build in expensive highly populated areas with strained utilities instead of just out in the boonies is more proof that AI is intended as a torture machine for goys

62364398
>>62358781
Don’t buy a house in a poor area.

62364403
>>62364393
The only thing that gives me joy anymore is poorfag suffering. Have I become insane?

62364437
>>62364346
yeah a hole in the ground with a lot of water would be the last place an AI data center would be built. and if anyone thinks otherwise, just explain to the governor or town council or whatever that you make $150k/yr so you're rich and you will NOT be treated like this.

62364445
>>62364437
Next to the lake in a foresty area with a gated community nearby which means facilities are already there would be a perfect location for a data center.

62364519
>>62364256
I don't think that Saline data center will go through here. They allowed the voters to decide. I guess that fake glowie kidnapping attempt on the Governor pissed her off. So now she is just yanking their chain.

62364521
>>62358781
Oh thank fuck none in Idaho

62364553
>>62364056
Christ I am so sick of everything I don't know how anyone can go on day by day

62367479
>>62364521
Nothing is in Idaho

item.title: Anon, someone oneshotted a Runescape-quality MMO with Claude. — 59 replies — 90.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
Anon, someone oneshotted a Runescape-quality MMO with Claude.

Open thread • Replies: 59 • Updated: 2026-06-14 21:32 UTC

OP

Anon, someone oneshotted a Runescape-quality MMO with Claude. If you're not able to get filthy rich with this tech, you are just a brainless clown.

https://worldofclaudecraft.com/

Early replies (first 3)

62362742
oldschool runescape is free

62362747
looks like shit
>If you're not able to get filthy rich with this tech, you are just a brainless clown.
sure if you can scam some subhumans but you're competing with 1 billion jeet scammers

62362749
>>62362737
Buy
An
Ad
!

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62364043
>>62363623
Yeah but being able to spam "nigger" is pretty old school, most modern games would fine a way to permaban you for that

62364090
>>62363642
it is the point, these retarded scriptkiddies think it's amazing to pay anthropic to shit out something worse then something already available for free. all claude can do is copy open source code

62364293
>>62364090
Claude can do so much more than you think. get good at prompting

62364348
>>62364090
When are you retards going to learn? LLMs learn in almost the same way humans do. They understand things conceptually.

62364357
People with balls played this MMO

62364390
>>62363118
it's not automatic, there's literally a mod that goes through the chat logs and bans anyone who says nigger

62364391
>>62362753
So you get to be a funko pop?

62364400
sounds gay

62364408
>>62364390
What's he get paid?

62364447
>>62362737
IMAGINE OSRS 2.0 holy

62364461
>>62362843
>>62362844
it's so over for snailcat retards

62364719
>>62362737
impressive but 7 fps isn't going to work.

62364883
>>62364719
>7FPS isn't going to work
I bet you dont have hardware acceleration on dumbie

62364978
>>62363623
the assets are free open source models and stuff so it looks like shit

The gameplay is a classic wow clone, it's shockingly similar

62365021
>>62364090
Thanks...these dumbfucks thinks it cool they reskinned something and made it gay

62365211
>>62362737
>oneshotted
100% guarantee it wasn't actually "oneshotted". Also Fable 5 got banned already, even if you could one shot, it's over now.

62365245
>>62362737
this is trash

62365483
>>62362737
Dune banned AI for a reason.

62365496
>>62365211
/loop until complete

62365514
https://github.com/levy-street/world-of-claudecraft/blob/main/src/game/interactions.ts

>if if else if if else if if else else if if if else if

it's claude code alright

62365881
>>62362737
>Runescape-quality
so it's utter unplayable dogshit?
wow AI is the future

62365955
>>62362737
>>62362753
>>62363118
Globo-Homo Of SlopCraft

62365991
>>62362737
Very interesting. Not the project though, any starter $10 RPG template is a more complete game with less bugs. It's a completely useless code base worth $0. It's only impressive to people who understand nothing about game development. But it's interesting that OP hired spam bots for promotion. Is he somehow making money off of it?

62366047
>>62362742
>>62363625
in the shitty art style
also runescape is ultrashit skinner box

62366586
>>62364357
FUCK YEAH UTANI NIGGER

62366746
>>62362737
If you rip an existing open source game yourself rather than ask Claude to do it, you get documentation to go along with it.

62366802
>>62362737
Claude made me a trading bot for LINK. I am now down 99%. Thanks, claude!

62366858
>>62366802

perfect, 2 mistakes in one go!
>/biz/ dream

62367257
>>62366746
Or you just ask claude to create documentation along with the code and you don't get in trouble with the original creators.

62367267
>>62362775
It's so funny to see all the people boasting 10000x productivity and yet nothing changed. Actually everything is worsening, again and again.

item.title: I work for an RIA managing assets and helping clients w/ financial planning AMAA >bought gold at $1900 >IBIT in my retir… — 18 replies — 72.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
I work for an RIA managing assets and helping clients w/ financial planning AMAA >bought gold at $1900 >IBIT in my retir…

Open thread • Replies: 18 • Updated: 2026-06-14 22:05 UTC

OP

I work for an RIA managing assets and helping clients w/ financial planning AMAA
>bought gold at $1900
>IBIT in my retirement accounts
>catastrophe bonds are my favorite asset class

Early replies (first 3)

62366984
>>62366943
i'm going DCA on 80% VTI 20% XSD until cows come home, and then exiting XSD entirely if the semiconductor sector goes completely tits-up
how does this risk profile compare to the recommended amount, assuming that i'm already tolerant of short-term drawdowns in favor of long term growth?

62367052
>>62366984
Depends on your time horizon, I'll assume you're young (<30) so a typical advisor would tell you that's an appropriate risk tolerance (100% us equity with an industry tilt). Most target date funds for a 2060 retirement are 90%+ equity right now.

The "rule of thumb" is 100 or 120 minus your age = how much % stocks you are overall.

Also, if you look into something called the "efficient frontier" the basic idea is the units of risk you take on per unit of return past 85% stocks is dog.

I'm worried about regime changes though, in which case stocks could have a decade+ of awful returns

62367065
>>62367052
>Also, if you look into something called the "efficient frontier" the basic idea is the units of risk you take on per unit of return past 85% stocks is dog.
5-15% bond ETF into the mix then? there's not much i can diversify into since my net worth is trash.

>I'm worried about regime changes though, in which case stocks could have a decade+ of awful returns
what would be the damage mitigation strategy for pure ETF portfolios? sell some (or all) and dip into bond ETFs?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62367096
>>62367065
>5-15% bond ETF into the mix then? there's not much i can diversify into since my net worth is trash.
Traditionally the asset class would be an investment grade bond fund, if ETF that's BND or BSV for US.
BND if you don't care about interest rate risk, appropriate for retirement accounts
BSV if in a taxable

Nontraditionally I think there are asset classes that have done way better in real returns than investment grade bonds and are not as correlated as we saw in 2022. Gold, cat bonds, EM bonds, managed futures to name a few. There's ETFS for all of those and they tend to give 6%-8% a year return on average and don't move in the same direction of equities.

>what would be the damage mitigation strategy for pure ETF portfolios? sell some (or all) and dip into bond ETFs?
Market timing is hard or impossible to do effectively. I'd figure out a portfolio allocation "built for it" and rebalance alone the way.

That's why lots of my accounts have managed futures, gold, and cat bonds.

62367102
>>62366984
What manga is this? I think an adaptation was announced

62367123
My question might be a little too low level for you.

I'm an artist working tech support and my wife's parents bought us a house. We have two daughters but no mortgage.

I make less than average wage right now, and I know that there are no royal roads to geometry, but what are some financial concepts that'd be a good idea for someone like me to learn to work against my financial illiteracy?

62367141
>>62367096
i see, thanks.
btw how much weight should i give to portfolios generated using efficiency frontier calculators? i plugged in VGT to see what kind of portfolio i'd get, and it came up with something unexpected like 11% VTI and 75% VGT plus some bonds for sharpe ratio maximized portfolio. this seems incredibly risky to me.

62367144
>>62367052
Regime change is right, and gold to $20k+ and your clients will probably be itching to sue or worse that a rock ass stomped equities as equities enter a lost decade.

62367153
>>62367123
Actually the question I get almost weekly, most people are financially illiterate and only some realize it and try to change that. Good on ya.

Concepts to understand (off the top of my head in rough order of importance)
>ESTATE PLANNING SINCE YOU HAVE KIDS (do you have a trust/will?)
>Time value of money (how compounding returns get out of control over a long enough time span)
>Index funds and how few people beat the market (aka buy VT/VOO and BND and drool on yourself to beat 85% of asset managers)>Interest (what interest rates actually mean and what the risk free rate is)
>Budgeting/Cash Flows (how much are you saving and how much can you increase that through "offense" and "defense"
>Account tax types (IRA, 401k, normal brokerage, Roths, etc)
>4% safe withdrawal rate rule
>Why 10% (or higher) savings rate is important

The Simple Path to Wealth by JL Collins is a GREAT read if you have the time. Can be found online for free in PDF.

62367173
>>62367153
Many thanks for your time

62367184
>>62367144
Gold is real money, fiat is fiat.

Most people don't understand how our current system works and would be HORRIFIED if they know the shit that got pulled on them with SVB bank or that we print M2 into existence.

I made so much goddamn money when I saw them turn the printers on and bought GLD a few years ago.

>>62367141
That is incredibly risky, I'd ignore those calculators. Without seeing the data I can tell you they aren't looking back far enough for their calcs (30+ years, preferably 50). Maybe consider something that has these classes represented by ETF, example %s that I'd do:
60% VT
20% VGT
10% GLDM
10% BSV or ILS if you're spicy

This gives you both ex-US and US exposure with a heavy but prudent tech tilt on top of non-correlated assets to rebalance through volatility (gold and cat bonds). Cat bonds don't move with anything, they are truly uncorrelated. Gold goes up when equities go down usually, they like inflation and fear.

>>62367130
When do you plan to use the $?

62367187
>>62367173
I owe it to anon, this is my penance

62367230
>>62367213
HYSA isn't bad if you don't know horizon. 3% risk free is great.

> I have just been saving for shit like that, unexpected expenses
This is literally what insurance is for bro, 2% deductible and they buy you a new roof. I just went through that for hail damage.

How much does it cost a month all-in to exist?

62367266
>>62367052
>units of risk you take on per unit of return
One thing I've never understood from asset managers, everyone always says learn risk analysis, manage risk vs. reward, etc. I get it. But
HOW DO YOU MEASURE UNITS OF RISK AND RETURN????
Just give me some typical examples so I know what to look into. No one ever explains this.

62367326
>>62367184
>Maybe consider something that has these classes represented by ETF, example %s that I'd do:
thanks for the insight.
>ILS
what is this and why does the graph sawtooth like that?

62367364
>>62367266
It's actually super easy, return is real return before taxes and "risk" is volatility aka standard deviation.

>>62367247
Bummer for that experience, but it could have been bad luck and it was a long time ago - regulations have grown stricter for insurance since then. Consider that your lived experience could be making you biased.

That being said, having a phat AF emergency fund can help you sleep at night, but 6 months is good and 12 months is phat and over 12 months is inefficient. Leads to why I asked about spending rate.

$1950/month x 130% because margin of safety and most people spend a little more on maintenance and shit than they think (property taxes?) = $~2,500/m so $30k a year living expenses.

You have over 4 years in what most would consider an efund man. It's pretty inefficient.

Think about meeting halfway and keeping $60k in the HYSA imo.

The rest can go into a taxable or even a Roth IRA if you AGI isn't over the MAGI threshold. Roths are VERY flexible on taking out contributions (any time, any reason) and give great tax advantages to the growth if you make it to 60.

The other option is a taxable brokerage (max flexibility, but no tax advantage). You could get over 3% pretty easily with minimal risk taken on.

50% VT, 20% BSV, 20% JPST, 10% ILS would give you such a nicer return with a hilariously low max drawdown. You could backtest it on portfolio visualizer to see, but would have to replace the ILS with BSV to get a decent backtest.

62367445
>>62367326
ILS is a catastrophe bond ETF. They buy all kinds of catastrophe bonds from around the world for different natural disasters. Catastrophe bonds are floating rate (no interest rate risk) bonds that only pay principal back if the named disaster doesn't occur.

Example: You can buy a Louisiana catastrophe bond from State Farm insurance and you don't get your principal back if a hurricane hits the state and it might pay something like 10% a year in interest. The insurance company is letting you "buy the risk".

ILS buys all kinds of cat bonds so is diversified enough that you don't get fucked. It's an investment category that as a result has NO CORRELATION to any other asset class. It doesn't move with anything which is amazing for portfolio building.

>why does the graph sawtooth like that?
That's the NAV going down proportionally to the fat af 1% a month dividend payments.

62367457
>>62367445
amazing. thanks for your insight and explanation.

item.title: Software update automatically turns off Amazon delivery driver’s AC during dangerous summer heat — 17 replies — 47.2/hr
item.content:encoded:
Software update automatically turns off Amazon delivery driver’s AC during dangerous summer heat

Open thread • Replies: 17 • Updated: 2026-06-14 21:50 UTC

OP

Software update automatically turns off Amazon delivery driver’s AC during dangerous summer heat

Early replies (first 3)

62367014
>>62367008
Based.

62367018
>>62367008
why would he do this? I dont get it

62367051
>>62367018
shitty electric cars:
>The AC only shuts off if the driver sliding door is left open for more than 30 seconds — a battery conservation measure.”

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62367054
>>62367008
Why do you hate the environment chud? This will reduce carbon emissions. You’re Hitler.

62367056
>>62367018
You wouldn’t get it, wagie.

62367186
>>62367008
Oooooooo wagies

62367202
>>62367008
whats dangerous about voluntary employment?
>oooooooh its dangerous
then dont do it. its dangerous to jump off a cliff thats why people dont do it

62367212
I used to drive a catering van for work, blasting the ac while having the windows down was one of the few perks.

62367214
>>62367018
I crunched the numbers, and your AC usage is costing about $200 a year in energy costs. Multiply that by 500 thousand wagies and that is 100 million a year I'm now saving! You can get a cheap and reliable ice pack on amazon.com, but remember, filling it with ice from the break room is considered theft.

62367233
>>62367214
I'm at the party already, but just to clarify, my savings have nothing to do with your wage. Now get some rest, you will need it.

62367237
>>62367233
u really think bezos gets a sick satisfaction from watching the 1M poor cattle wagies that work for his company suffer?

Squid games makes more sense by every passing day

62367243
>>62367018
You don't get to $250B without shutting off the AC. Ever get into a car with the AC blasting? The odds are that person isn't a billionaire. Think about that.

62367258
>>62367237
The trick is to set the incentive structure of your management layers so they do it for you. But I always take the time to make the tick tock wagie thread.

62367272
>>62367258
wow that is even more twisted its like its own machine that u dont even need to touch

god damn

62367273
>>62367018
Frugality. Check the leadership principles.

62367306
>>62367237
Yeah, he does. It’s fucking awesome, but he’ll need to whip the goyim a little harder if he wants to beat Muskie

62367358
>>62367243
Rich people splurge but they are frugal. Brokies just see the splurging part.

62361150
>>62361136
I was never possible. The recession that would have started at 150 would have immediately lowered the price again. Also reserve releases, flexible demand, increase of production by usa and russia, the pipeline of the saudis and more factors were always there. I told oilschizos that but they wouldnt believe me.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62361168
AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA

62361804
Trump.. please don't take the deal.. My oil bags..

62361809
>>62361092

Oil pricing is literally about how much blood you can squeeze from the peasants

62361831
>>62361092

>>62364657
I bought both and am still in profit on both.

62364700

62364717
>>62364657

62365081

NOOOO WHY IS MONEY USELESS WHY WHY WHY WAAAAH PLEASE SIR
I WILL GIVE YOU EVERYTHIN-

PLEASE SIR THE TRILLION MONEY
ACK

62359354
>>62359336

I'm doing my part demoralizing these pathetic rightoid hard workers. The government pays for everything, gave me a huge house and I break the law almost daily KEK
I have everything my neighbours have

62365739

>>62359400

62365752

62365755
>>62365752

62365772

62365810
>>62359336

62365816

62365831

62365833

62365844

62365866

>>62365724

62365875
>>62365866

Stfu faggot I've been here longer than you have
I used to be a capitalist cuck like most of you but something finally snapped recently. And I believe many on /biz/ are ready for a communist revolution having witnessed the capitalist system up close

62365880
>>62365827
The USA couldn't defeat Iran with a trillion dollars military
Russia couldn't defeat Ukraine with thousands of men. Ukraine can't defeat Russia with all the help they got from NATO nations

62366055
>>62365875
>I believe many on /biz/ are ready for a communist revolution
that's why /biz/ shits on communism so much.
>I used to be a capitalist cuck like most of you but something finally snapped recently.
you mean you're not making money and are too broke, in other words, stupid, to live comfortably in the system?
only poors want a redistribution of wealth.
>Stfu faggot I've been here longer than you have
No one cares. This is a crypto board and you're /pol/ posting.

62366077
>>62359336
why are you seething over someone else's wealth? someone that you don't even know? try it and you either end up dead or in prison either way you still lose.

62366107
>>62366055
materially I am personally comfortable though
But I want it all because I'm not a cuck like you

62366123
>>62365833

No he wouldn't. Power has never been individual and has always been about your ability to build organizations and leverage armies of men, dumbfuck. Can't even edgelord right without sounding like a toddler.

62366125
>Create strife and problems
>Create poor people by infiltrating government and taxing everyone to death and beyond
>"Gommunism will save you!"

62366130
>>62365880

We weren't talking about that, we were basing it off of your retarded little "but I could shoot him" hypothetical. If we're talking straight gang laws Elon Musk is still able to conquer entire micronations, much less have to deal with you lmfao.

That's actually one thing that's always vexed me, how cucked and servile billionaires must be to not leverage their astronomic wealth more in violent ways. Because they can afford to disappear anyone they want.

62366171
>>62366123
>Power has never been individua
BANG BANG BANG
>ACK WHY AM I DYING!
>I AM SUPER NEXT LEVEL RICH WITH CONTROL OF MY DADDIES BANKS AND THE COUNTRY

news says he dies of heart attack and case is closed
>NO NO NO THEY KILLED ME IT WASN'T A HEART ATTACK PLEASE

62366359
>>62366171

62366421
>>62366107

The reality is you have no power to change your situation.

62366441

62366449

item.title: how much money do u need to date women? Also are they ok if u are not ambitious career driven like if i have 10M but NEE… — 44 replies — 25.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
how much money do u need to date women? Also are they ok if u are not ambitious career driven like if i have 10M but NEE…

Open thread • Replies: 44 • Updated: 2026-06-14 20:29 UTC

OP

how much money do u need to date women? Also are they ok if u are not ambitious career driven like if i have 10M but NEET would they be fine with it.. probably not i think they want you to be grinding your job 24/7 and making like 400k a year

Early replies (first 3)

62365550
dating is outdated chud, find something else to focus on

62365555
>>62365550
but i want a gf to watch mobis with, to eat some delicious food, cook together maybe and stuff.. I got a bluray player recently and im building up a collection we could do it together if i had a gf

:(

62365557
>>62365540
a good prostitute in euro cuck land will service you starting from 100$ for 30 mins. Anything else is cope

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62365661
>>62365555
Sounds like you want a friend or bro not a gf

62365697
>>62365555
Checked. Women think men are sex addicts, when we just want someone to watch Shrek with on bluray

62365735
>>62365697
>>62365600
damn is it really that bad to wanna watch high quality movies with a gf on bluray?? I have streaming apps but im tired of them since theyre all shit

62365738
>>62365587

- Looks = 1 - 10
- Wealth = 1 - 10
- Status = 1 - 10

- Personality = 1 - 10 (Low personality score = go-with-the-flow, outgoing, fun and risk-taking behavior. High personality score = standoffish, self-isolating, boring and risk-averse behavior.)

- Proximity = 1 - 10 (Low proximity score = living in a dense urban area and working in a high-volume traffic area. High proximity score = living in a rural area and working in a low-volume traffic area.)

- High-Value Male = 50+ Points
- Average Male = 10 - 25 Points
- Low-Value Male = 0 - 9 Points
- Incel = < 0 Points

62365748
>>62365540
Women want a 9+ handsome face, ripped bod and big dick. Money is cope.

62365871
>>62365540
>>62365555
You answered your own question. It's not about a specific threshold of money it's the perception you're working hard for HER specifically.

genuinely nice girls exist, but are extremely rare. if you want to NEET with someone for eternity unironically date an r9k foid

62365882
>>62365540
The biggest complaints from women are men who are mean, slobs and irresponsible. So if you have a bunch of money and want to NEET, it shouldn’t be that hard to sweep a fellow nerdy girl off her feet. Be affectionate, have a clean space, and don’t blow off things like a date night or blow through all your money lol
The girls who want grindset dudes are most likely to divorce rape you.

62365897
>>62365871
I think the problem is that nice girls are the hardest to find and not even that rare. I know several that still live at home to take care of their parents/family, and have at-home hobbies like knitting/crafting.
When the fuck would you meet any of them?? Especially if they work from home or a female dominated field like childcare.
My best advice will always be to make friends with people and then ask if they know any single women that would be a good match for you. You have to have the ability to show people you’re a good friend that wouldn’t fuck yup their friendship with the girl though

62365953
>>62365882
>mean, slobs, irresponsible
These are the complaints women have about the men they continue to date. So the stuff that is annoying but not a dealbreaker.

62365958
>>62365882
yet somehow that is the type they are attracted to and want to have kids with

62365989
>>62365540
>6’5’’
>8 inch sick with 6 inch girth
>230lbs lean and cut muscle but you can’t be a workout freak you need to have the muscle naturally without doing much exercise all the time
>Perfect hairline, as good as a teenagers
>square jaw line
>wide shoulders
>deep voice
>be naturally extroverted and charismatic
>have many high status friends
>have many ex girl friends so you pass women’s pre-selection requirement
>have 10 million dollars but also have a high status job like a brain surgeon or fighter jet pilot so she can brag to her friends what you do for a living
>be able to speak 3 different languages so you can make her wet when your at the high end French restaurant and talk to the waiter in French and order a high end wine bottle
>have a dark and mysterious secret about yourself to keep her intrigued and excited (maybe you are the world’s best assassin, maybe you are an associate of a multi-billion dollar drug operation as a high ranking middleman, or you are a genius and secretly working on a project to save the energy crisis. Something that is cool and will make her wet when she finds out


This is what you need to get a 5/10 or higher in the year of 2020+6

62366005
>>62365587
>>62365738
Do the math OP.

62366027
>>62365989
>have all this
>become her bf
>she cheats on you with a nigga that has NOTHING of this

62366041
>>62365608
Animal should be allowed to just breed and leave, there is nothing like third parties in the interaction.

62366052
>>62365557
>dude just get herpes with a romanian gypsy in a shitty hotel in the suburbs

kys

62366054
>Women or leveraged, margined silver miners?
Mmmmm...... you're gonna have to get back to me on that bro

62366257
>>62365587
>>62365738
>>62366005
^ This system is outdated, but I've invented a new one. The equation is identical, but the compounding effects of the numerator have been upscaled, personality remains the same. Proximity now has a negative and positive value.

62366581
>>62366052
Yep, sounds incredibly based

62366590
>>62365989
Delusion
Just look at families walking around

62366599
>>62365958
>>62365953
Do you know any married men
And those things can be deal breakers, there are lines/limits

62366630
>>62365540
the only girls that care about careers in 2026 are egg freezing hags. you need just enough money to get to where women are (like the bar or anywhere else) and live somewhere. anything past that is diminishing returns.

62366635
anon don't listen to desperate insecure virgins for dating advice
the world is full of poor women who will date you if you have a good personality
when my wife and I started dating, I was literally unemployed and living with my parents
Now I make more than her but it took me 5 years to get there.

62366639
>>62365555
>I got a bluray player recently and im building up a collection

Dad?

62366677
>>62365608
all of these women made a different man spend thousands and wait months before fucking really makes you ponder

62366728
>>62366599
well eventually these kinds of women also tend to be single mothers

62367007
>>62365897
Yes paradoxically the girls that are most wife material aren't the ones going around looking to date. I think if you are out of school you're out of luck
>Girlfriend through connections
I know this sounds stupid, but I'd feel like a cuck if I met my girlfriend through a mutual.
Think about it, MY girlfriend would have been interested in talking to someone else FIRST. I wouldn't want to date a girl with guy friends anyways

Impossible propositions are abound

62367017
>>62366635
Do the math.

62367050
>>62367007
Yeah, that’s pretty retarded.
There are plenty of non-sexual reasons why a guy might know some other girl, like a family member, girlfriend/wife’s friend, former co-worker, former school friend.
You could make friends with girls to try to date one of their friends too.
The crux is on your ability to be a normal person to any normal person regardless of gender or age.
That’s how you find girls who aren’t sluts and divorce rapists. Not how you sleep around though.
So you have to figure out if what you really want is someone to have sex with regularly, or someone to start a family with. Because it’s a lot of social effort.

62367055
>>62367007
I just realized, you may have severely low self esteem if you can’t handle the thought of a gf talking to someone else before you.
Low self esteem is girl repellant
Fix that first

62367080
>>62365555
Checked and damn feels bad, I hope you make it.

>>62365540
Former sex haver here, if she loves you not much. Unironically you could go have a picnic with some bullshit like pizza, or go on a road trip. Strategic use of money is ideal. Don't just buy flowers, get them delivered to her work so all her coworkers get pissed and jealous. You want enough money to lock down a nice wedding and kids but thats really it, this was my fatal mistake. I have enough for three weddings now but opportunities are gone for me.

item.title: WTF — 11 replies — 24.6/hr
item.content:encoded:
WTF

Open thread • Replies: 11 • Updated: 2026-06-14 21:45 UTC

OP

>try day trading
>lose
>try holding spot
>lose
>try trade with trend
>lose
>try trade against trend
>lose
>try day trading
>lose
>try any trading method
>lose
wtf i should do bros i dont want to return wageslaving still has 30k capital left.

Early replies (first 3)

62366888
>>62366886
You clearly haven't lost enough, keep going.

62366893
You should be wageslaving until you have either 400k in investments or enough to make bare minimum 6k a month in interest. You've fucked up, OP

62366920
>>62366886
Spent 60 hours a week studying trading strategies for at least a year before you put in real money.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62366946
there's numbers are probability of a loss based on how long you hold a stock

just holding for one year, you have 75% odds that you'll be up

62366985
>>62366886
Bro Im going to give some advice. Put that 30k on Topuria to win tonight for an easy 20%
Or better yet put that 30k on Sean O'Malley to win tonight first for an easy 20%. and then use that 36k on Topuria.
If you dont do this, im coming back to this thread later to laugh at you

62367071
>>62366886
Keep going you’re bound to make it

62367099
your day-trading sounds more like gambling
search for investment strategy instead!
>work in the meantime

62367210
>>62366985
>put that 30k on Sean O'Malley to win tonight first for an easy 20%. and then use that 36k on Topuria.
>win 10k
>put 30k on both o'malley and topuria
>win 13k
youre a true biztard kek

62367235
>>62366886
You have 100% failure rate, that's impressive. Just do the opposite of what you wanted to do.

62367264
>>62367210
recheck ur math retard

62367330
>>62366886
bro just don't be a fucking loser it's that simple.

item.title: Hello, /biz/. I am a newfag full disclosure. However I have about $5,000 just sitting in my bank account and i would lik… — 33 replies — 21.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
Hello, /biz/. I am a newfag full disclosure. However I have about $5,000 just sitting in my bank account and i would lik…

Open thread • Replies: 33 • Updated: 2026-06-14 20:41 UTC

OP

Hello, /biz/.

I am a newfag full disclosure. However I have about $5,000 just sitting in my bank account and i would like to start investing it somewhere. I was doing a little bit of googling and it looks like getting into the s&p 500 is a good idea. A Roth IRA also looked okay, but i don't want to withdrawl it when i'm 100 years old and shitting in a bag.

What's the best place for investing for someone that's never invested in anything before? How do you even do it?

Thanks for your time, /biz.

Early replies (first 3)

62366502
I would not get too much of anything right now. Unless you don't mind bag holding for a few years. Good way to keep track of something but damn sure will you likely be averaging down in the bear market until it goes back up. Make sure that it is not too high nor something unlikely to survive in 5 years. DO NOT BUY MOONING STUFF.

62366509
>>62366401
Zcash or Litecoin

62366516
>>62366401
write down whatever suggestions you get
make a note not to invest in anything recommended to you here.
>>62366509
absolutely do not "invest" in crypto unless you want to lose your money.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62366534
$5000 is nothing. Before you invest anything, you must allocate $10000 safety margin. Just so you could have a piece of mind. So you can afford nor worry about getting sick in the most responsible time.

Having done so, you will direct your other resources, with a better, clearer idea in your head., which is, DCA extra cash.

Investing $5k anywhere either wouldn't yield your shit, or you would lose it all and be double broke.

Do nor invest those it's to early to think about inflation here.

62366565
>>62366502
I really don't know about individual stocks which is why the s&p 500 looked interesting because of the average 7% growth, which outpaces inflation. However i don't have a high risk tolerance because im a baby back bitch

>>62366509
lol

>>62366516
i know to not buy crypto at least

>>62366534
I could do $10,000. That would just have me digging into emergency cash funds however.
i should be a bit more clear, My plan right now at least was $5,000 down now for upfront, and then $1,000 per month into the s&p 500. But i dont know shit about investing or if this even a good idea or not, on top of my low risk tolerance. right now my money is just sitting doing absolutely nothing.

62366571
S&p but you won't be a millionaire. Youll get a 3x in probably 20 years. Just DCA and chill

62366574
>>62366534
I started with just a few hundred doing AMC. Still less than $2000 is in stocks. Yeah I immediately sold and invested in other things. I did not bother to get my return on investments until January of this year. Then did the same thing 5 years ago but better. This is what happens when you start in a bull market. Go short and pick stocks that will ride out the bear market for the longs. Sure I made $1000 but never truly withdrew that didn't involve months of shuffling money around. This year I put 200 in and out depending on the month when I was buying and selling. It's really all the same money I put in 5 years ago plus investment returns.

Funny enough one of the stocks I did buy was AMC again because they finally stopped shorting. I think you might see a 5X return on investment on that. It's cheaper than most other movie theater stocks right now.

62366578
>>62366565
May point was HAVE $10k emergency fund first. THEN just DCA 4k/mo into 500. There isn't any other way.

62366584
>>62366401
Op, I'm gonna make something perfectly clear and transparent here.

Do not, I repeat, do not invest in anything crapto related. Anyone promoting anything crapto is a scammer and is looking for exit liquidity. Crapto has no marginal buyer, it has no uses, it gives you no rights. Those promoting it are merely looking for EXIT LIQUIDITY to pump their bags so they can take your CASH and move it into safer investments. Be smart and stick to GOOD STOCKS and INDEX FUNDS.

62366593
>>62366578
Ah shit sorry tou only have $1k/mo. Do that. Never fucking touch saylor with a 10 foot pole.

62366609
>>62366574
I might want to warn you about the capital gains tax. Especially if you don't hold for at least a year. Be prepared to donate to a charity with a portion of your gains. If you leave it in your stock portfolio keep enough money aside in your bank account for that charity too.

62366634
The one reason why I am not telling you to wait for the AI bubble is that we live in clown world. This stuff might keep pumping for a meme 2029 stock market crash. It was supposed to crash in 1927 according to this prediction from the 1875. Fairly accurate but also a self fulfilling prophesy.

62366652
>>62366578
"emergency fund" should at least be gold or VOO. Cash is trash.

62366675
>>62366571
not really looking to be rich. just looking to be free. i find myself in a very fortunate position at the moment, I have literally zero debts, very low bills, and a job.

>>62366574
What's AMC? i don't know any of the buzzwords.

>>62366593
What's saylor?

>>62366584
s&p 500 would be good then right?

>>62366652
I actually have some gold, silver, and platinum. not a lot, maybe about $5,000 at current value.

62366699
>>62366675
My strategy is to look for a stock at ATH with low P/E then look at the financials, mainly cash flow. If the stock has momentum, is cheap and is making cash you can't lose. Ignore technicals and "gut feelings" about the industry however I'd avoid cyclical stuff like commodities or retail.

62366731
>>62366509
Anything but ZEC. ZEC after a 10x pump in a bear market and then a major asset ending exploit that was up for years, ZEC is the next bagholder stock.

I ironically Litecoin will pay you more at this point, I'm not convinced that will do anything either though.

62366741
>>62366401
Look into dollar cost averaging at least anon

62366774
>>62366401
Listen faggot. Disregard everything everyone says here. My guess is is you are in your early 20’s.

62366786
You should go through a roth ira still first with such little $ always as your first deposit for investments after 401k match is met if available. $7500 is max deposit this year. You can always pull your deposited money back out anytime with no restrictions. Pulling out profits would be tax and penalties, but otherwise if you need it suddenly you could pull your 5k back out, leave your profits in the account.

62366788
>>62366774
All you need to do is buy Link. That will give you 700 Link already. Which is an amount that a lot of scrubs on reddit and Twitter haven’t even achieved yet. Link is changing the entire financial system which is why investing in anything else other than gold and silver is a waste of time.

Get the 700 link. Try and push it up to 1,000 or more if able to… and you’ll be literally retired in 2-7 years.

62366796
>>62366731
Don’t listen to this advice. It would be fine if you had 30k and wanted to gamble a bit with 5-10k…. But you only have 5k. Get the 700 LINK literally forget about it and slowly add more cuz each 100 link after that 700 link is a lot until you get to 1,500 link. Then each 100 after that doesn’t matter as much anymore based on your current living situation which probably isn’t that good.

62366812
>>62366774
nope. im old. had a rough time in my 20s and clawed my way out of crippling debt and now can finally invest into something.

>>62366786
that's interesting actually. i was under the impression that you can't pull anything out of your Roth IRA until you're shitting into a bag on your deathbed pretty much. Why can't you do more than $7500? I was reading that it's a way safer investment too. I was also thinking about a High Yield Savings account, because i have a very low risk tolerance.

I have a special super power that the second i put money into anything it will immediately disappear.

62366816
>>62366534
>$5000 is nothing

He is right. You have zero chance to change your life with this amount unless you put it into Link. 700 Link for 5k…. Slowly boost it up to 1,000 Link and you’ll are now part of a 25,000 person club with at minimum 1,000 link in the world. This is the only way you will get your freedom. And when you don’t invest in it and you realize you could have saved yourself listening to this post 3 years from now when everyone is being rounded up and thrown in UBI camps… you will kys for not listening to me before you get rounded up.

62366824
>>62366812
Ok well whatever… you are in your late 30’s. Buy Link. That’s literally all you have to do. All the other bullshit is noise. Even if you happen to do relatively well in stocks it’s all overinflated and will collapse. Don’t invest in the market with the rest of the riffraff. Just buy link. It’s your only way out.

62366834
>>62366824
I don't know what a Link is.

62366841
It’s one thing you get fucked when there was no way you couldn’t get fucked. But to know about something and not invest in it and then it changed how everything is done… then you will Kys for not acting. Even holding BTC and selling 8 years early wasn’t a big deal cuz no one knew. But now we know how high some of these coins can go and we know how fucked everything is now. Link is the way out.

62366846
>>62366834
Chainlink. This board has had a minimum of a dozen threads on it for 9 years now. Get coinbase acct and buy Chainlink

62366848
>>62366846
Minimum of a dozen threads daily for 9 years I meant

62366887
>>62366675
American Classic Movies. It just stopped being a meme stock and a normal safe stock that is low right now. They are done shorting. I am serious. Bought right before the bleeding stopped and turned around. Bobo broke up with Melvin!

62366897
it depends whether you are investing for retirement or if you want to use the money before then. if for retirement I would open a Roth IRA and invest in an s&p 500 etf or VTI. if not for retirement, I would do the same in a regular taxable account. if using a taxable account, I would get in the habit of investing a little more each month. maybe set up an automatic scheduled transfer from your bank account to your brokerage account. also make sure to set up automatic dividend reinvestment.

62367025
>>62366652
Emergency fund must be liquid. That is is you need it on weekend you get it. That's cash. Maaaaybe a deposit.

62367035
>>62366401
Tip #1
Don't listen to /biz/

62367112
>>62366774
>>62366788
>"disregard everything everyone says here"
>proceeds to shill the most shilled crypto on this board, ever

kys nigger

item.title: So when is SPCX going to crash? — 14 replies — 18.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
So when is SPCX going to crash?

Open thread • Replies: 14 • Updated: 2026-06-14 21:26 UTC

OP

> Next FOMC meeting
> Next earnings date
> Right when it gets into the Nasdaq100
> ?
There is no way that a company priced in hopium that actually loses money is not going to crash like a shitcoin at some point.

Early replies (first 3)

62366003
>>62365854
When is TSLA going to crash?

Musk can string out the SPCX hopium even longer than the TSLA hopium, possibly for decades.

62366023
>>62365854
I expect that every test launch of a SuperHeavy/Starship will create an options trader's dream.
* rocket blows up, stock price plunges
* test goes perfectly, stock price zooms

So, just trade straddles starting a day or two before every big event.

Ever seen Boeing's stock price after a crash? One plane goes down, whole stock drops. Never mind that it's usually either defective maintenance or the pilots' fault.

62366153
>>62365854
Look at this as you'd look at a shitcoin TGE.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62366334
>>62366153
Shitcoins crash so fucking hard when they do.

62366341
>>62366003
Tesla actually makes money, Spacex is a bunch of AI space datacenters dream bullshit. Only Starlink makes any money in it.

62366378
It will never be below 135. Only low iq brainlests that don’t understand how important mass/cost to orbit is and how important orbital refueling is think it like mega epic overvalued

Oh and SpaceX currently has no heavy lift competition. Only Amazon is in the field and their rocket exploded recently, they are years behind. Other competitors like rklb and fly can barely do small lift. Rklb is still working on neutron to compete with falcon on medium lift. SpaceX is a monopoly currently that will unlock the next frontier. But yeah you’re right, there is nothing to do in space and its just going to crash

62366436
>>62366378
Nigga once the money tap breaks down the market gets fucking fair very fucking quick.
Tesla has done -75% in the past.

62366443
>>62366003
Tesla makes cars, ai, robots, charging stations, solar panels, power batteries and electrical grid technology.
It wont.

62366451
>>62366436
Okay? It has also do 25000% growth since 2013. Your rebuttal?

62366518
>>62366451
The point is to figure out when it is going to crash to buy very low. If you want to get it now that is trading at infinite pe ratio go ahead.

62366779
>>62365854
Even if its not vaporware, these projects all take decades. There will be multiple overall market crashes/correctioba before they get anything done. Being a single stock, its gonna crash more often then the whole market. 100% chance of a dump right before any big got contracts are announces too so insiders can load up.

62366790
When all of Reddit and biz thinks something’s gonna crash, it’s probably gonna moon

Not in the stock but am now tempted for a short term position

62367082
>>62365854
The index inclusion narrative is getting frontrun. SPCX will go 30% up from its IPO price and go down from there

62367245
>>62365854
Just wait for another rocket explosion.
Buy the dip.
This shit is so easy.
